name: Double Click Exit
description: Double click to exit the level.

plat-only.name: Platformer Only
plat-only.description: Only activate the double click setting if you are on plats levels.

show-notification.name: Show Notification
show-notification.description: A message to remind you to double-click.

custom-text.name: Custom Message
custom-text.description: The text that appears when you click the exit button once.

click-speed.name: Click Speed (ms)
click-speed.description: The maximum time allowed between clicks (0 to 1000 milliseconds).
